title: salpichlaena volubilis
intro: Salpichlaena volubilis, also known as the 'climbing fern', is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Marattiaceae. It is native to tropical regions and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation and improving immune function. The herbal preparations of Salpichlaena volubilis include infusions and decoctions, which can be made by steeping the leaves or roots in hot water, and are used to treat various ailments.
